onboarding.title: First use
onboarding.intro: PITH removes noise from your prompts before sending to AI.
onboarding.see_example: See what happens with this prompt:
onboarding.result: AI gets only the intent. More direct answers, fewer tokens.

main.what_to_ask: What do you want to ask?
main.placeholder: e.g. Hi, could you help me implement JWT auth in my project? Thanks!
